title: Issue 2234 review stack routing continuity

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Make AW carry stacked-PR review phase continuity from startup through correction, proof, proof reuse, and closeout routing.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to existing PR comment attention, proof reuse, and startup presentation surfaces; do not build a separate review workflow.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact packet shape, compact projection fields, and focused tests for the review-stack routing contract.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires live GitHub writes, CI orchestration, parent-issue auto-close, or broad planning framework changes.
canonical_core.next_action: Commit the validated change and open the #2234 PR.
proof_expectations: Focused PR comment/proof reuse/runtime mirror tests pass.
Lint passes for changed runtime and test files.
AW implement/report validation confirms the changed-path contract remains routable.
completion_criteria: Startup exposes current stacked-review phase, dependency order, affected slice, proof manifest, reusable proof receipt state, next action, and closeout route.
Actionable review findings route to correction and focused proof instead of broad readiness prose.
Clean stack plus reusable proof routes to closeout while preserving parent boundaries.
Stale stack state routes to refresh before readiness claims.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -k "pr_comment_attention or proof_reuse_guidance or runtime_mirror_consistency" -q; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_core.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_startup.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; make typecheck; uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Live GitHub write automation, CI orchestration, parent issue auto-close, or broad planning framework changes.
